mapper.sql: id, scope_type, scope_id, operation, status, scanned_count, parsed_count, skipped_count, failed_count, indexed_document_count, indexed_chunk_count, failed_document_count, failures_json, started_at, completed_at, duration_ms, error_message, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_folder_runs ( id, scope_type, scope_id, operation, status, scanned_count, parsed_count, skipped_count, failed_count, indexed_document_count, indexed_chunk_count, failed_document_count, failures_json, started_at, completed_at, duration_ms, error_message, created_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{scopeType}, #{scopeId}, #{operation}, #{status}, #{scannedCount}, #{parsedCount}, #{skippedCount}, #{failedCount}, #{indexedDocumentCount}, #{indexedChunkCount}, #{failedDocumentCount}, #{failuresJson}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{durationMs}, #{errorMessage}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM knowledge_folder_runs WHERE (#{scopeType} IS NULL OR scope_type = #{scopeType}) AND (#{scopeId} IS NULL OR scope_id = #{scopeId}) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT FROM knowledge_folder_runs run WHERE created_at = ( SELECT MAX(inner_run.created_at) FROM knowledge_folder_runs inner_run WHERE inner_run.scope_type = run.scope_type AND ((inner_run.scope_id IS NULL AND run.scope_id IS NULL) OR inner_run.scope_id = run.scope_id) ) ORDER BY created_at DESC
